amendments.text:
(So)
An Airplane Flight Manual shall be fur-
nished with each airplane, having a
maximum certificated weight of more
than 6,000 pounds. The portiOns of this
document listed beiow shall be verified
and approved by the Administrator. and
shall be segregated. identified, aod
clearly distinguished from portions not
so approved. Additional items of infor-
mation having a tirect and important
bearing on safe operation may be re-
Quired by the Administrator when un-
usual design, operating, or handling
characteristics so warrant.
(b) For airplanes having a maximum
certificated weight of 6,000 pounds or
less an Airplane Flight Manual is not
reqUired; instead, the information pre-
scribed in this part for inclusion in the
Airplane Flight Manual shan be made
available to the operator by the manu-
facturer in the form of clearly stated
placards, markings. or manuals.
